meaning: adj.金属断面的显微镜观察的
examples: The effects of testing temperature on notch impact strength, fractographic features and fracture surface roughness of PVC have been studied.
Fractographic observations showed that hydrogen could induce surface cracks for smooth specimens and a cleavage fracture pattern for notch specimens at RT.
The mechanical properties testing, microstructure observation and fractographic features analysis of the troostite high chromium cast iron blade were carried out.
